mdRecord.dcterms:title: VA Association of Fire Chiefs Memorandums Regarding Meetings, Dues, and the Annual Convention, June 23, 1953 - July 28, 1953
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Memorandums written on June 23, 1953, concerning the VA Association of Fire Chiefs' 23rd annual convention about meetings with the fire chiefs and paying dues, with an included copy of the tentative program of this convention.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Fire departments
Virginia
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
